extortion.description: Otherwise, DALCANS will not make any exchange or refund of products ordered. Any product given back will be returned to DALCANS in its original condition and packaging and must include all of the product and its accessories. Any risk associated with returning the product is the responsibility of the Buyer. Failure to follow the procedure outlined above and specified period, the Purchaser cannot make any claim for nonconformity or defect of goods delivered, the products being deemed conformable and free from defect.company is headquartered in 36, rue des Petits Champs, 75002 Paris, France.<25 Employees, The total amount of data leakage is 1 TB.
